facebook.caption:
POV: you walked down Trần Hưng Đạo looking for coffee and found a bakery with 4.7 stars you'd never heard of.

Sugar Fusion Bakery at 39 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the kind of spot that makes you stop mid-stride. Fresh bakes, real effort, 264 reviews deep.

Not every great find in Phu Quoc is on the beach. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 4.7 stars. 264 reviews. One bakery on Trần Hưng Đạo that most tourists scroll right past. Sugar Fusion Bakery earns every single one of those stars. Go find it.
